name: ogg-spectrum-player
description: Desktop OGG player with real-time FFT spectrum visualization

scripts.electron:dev: wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:electron && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.dist:win:root: npm run build && npm run dist:win && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$f=Get-ChildItem 'dist\\OGG Spectrum Player Setup *.exe' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if($f){ Copy-Item $f.FullName -Destination (Join-Path (Get-Location) $f.Name) -Force; Write-Output ('copied: ' + $f.Name) } else { throw 'Setup exe not found.' }"
